zh.Castle Gresley, Derbyshire, England: 英國德比夏爾卡素 格萊斯利
zh.Drakelowe, Derbyshire, England: 英國德比夏爾德拉可洛福
zh.Drakelow, Derbyshire, England: 英國德比夏爾德拉可洛福
zh.lifeSummary: 當William Gresley於1206年出生在英國德比夏爾德拉可洛福時，他的父親Geoffrey de Greasley35歲，母親Margaret Somerville30歲。他於大約1242年與Elizabeth Bakepuiz在英國德比夏爾卡素 格萊斯利結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1254年6月之前在英國德比夏爾，埋葬在英國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Gresley于1206年出生在英国德比夏爾德拉可洛福时，他的父亲Geoffrey de Greasley35岁，母亲Margaret Somerville30岁。他于大约1242年与Elizabeth Bakepuiz在英国德比夏爾卡素 格萊斯利结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1254年6月之前在英国德比夏爾，埋葬在英国。

nameMeanings.name: Gresley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Greasley
meanings: 1  English: locative name, usually from Greasley (Notts) but possibly also from Gresley (Derbys). Some of the following early bearers may alternatively belong under (2), particularly the Lancs examples.

2 Norman, English: nickname, either from Old French greslet ‘marked as by hail’, i.e. pitted or pock-marked, or Old French greslet, gresli, grailet ‘thin, slim’. In early forms, the nickname has sometimes been confused with the place-name in (1). Compare Le Gresley in Jersey and Greslé, Grêlé in France.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When William Gresley was born in 1206, in Drakelowe, Derbyshire, England, his father, Geoffrey de Greasley, was 35 and his mother, Margaret Somerville, was 30. He married Elizabeth Bakepuiz about 1242, in Castle Gresley, Derbyshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died before June 1254, in Derbyshire, England, and was buried in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Gresley est né en 1206, à Drakelowe, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, Geoffrey de Greasley, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Margaret Somerville, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Bakepuiz environ 1242, à Castle Gresley, Derbyshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé avant juin 1254, à Derbyshire, Angleterre, et a été enterré à Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Gresley 1206 in Drakelowe, Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Geoffrey de Greasley 35 und seine Mutter Margaret Somerville 30. Er hat um 1242 in Castle Gresley, Derbyshire, England Elizabeth Bakepuiz geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb vor Juni 1254 in Derbyshire, England und wurde in England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Gresley è nato il nel 1206 nel Drakelowe, Derbyshire, England, il suo padre, Geoffrey de Greasley, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Somerville, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Bakepuiz circa 1242, nel Castle Gresley, Derbyshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì prima del giugno 1254, nel Derbyshire, England, e fu sepolto a England.

ja.lifeSummary: William Gresleyが1206年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアドラケロウで生まれた時，父Geoffrey de Greasleyは35歳，母Margaret Somervilleは30歳であった。約1242年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアカストル グレスリーでElizabeth Bakepuizと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1254年6月以前にイギリスデルブイシュアイアで死去し，イギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Gresley(이)가 1206년 영국 더비실르 드라켈로에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Geoffrey de Greasley(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Somerville(은)는 30세였다. 그는 대략 1242년 영국 더비실르 카스틀 그레슬리에서 Elizabeth Bakepuiz(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1254년 6월 이전 영국 더비실르에서 사망했으며 영국에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Gresley nasceu em 1206, em Drakelowe, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Geoffrey de Greasley, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Somerville, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Bakepuiz aproximadamente 1242, em Castle Gresley, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu antes junho de 1254, em Derbyshire, Inglaterra, e foi sepultado em Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Gresley родился в 1206 г. в местности дрекелоу, дирбишир, Англия, его отцу по имени Geoffrey de Greasley было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Somerville, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Bakepuiz около 1242 г. в местности кастл гресли, дирбишир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер перед июнь 1254 г. в местности дирбишир, Англия и был похоронен в местности Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Gresley nació en 1206, en Drakelowe, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Geoffrey de Greasley, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Margaret Somerville, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Bakepuiz aproximadamente 1242, en Castle Gresley, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió antes de junio de 1254, en Derbyshire, Inglaterra, y fue sepultado en Inglaterra.
